sentences.english: You are coming, aren't you?
sentences.hindi: तुम आ रहे हो, है ना?
sentences.pronunciation: you are coming aren't you

sentences.english: He didn't come, did he?
sentences.hindi: वह नहीं आया, आया ना?
sentences.pronunciation: he didn't come did he

sentences.english: This is beautiful, isn't it?
sentences.hindi: यह सुंदर है, है ना?
sentences.pronunciation: this is beautiful isn't it

sentences.english: You don't like this, do you?
sentences.hindi: तुम्हें यह पसंद नहीं है, है ना?
sentences.pronunciation: you don't like this do you

sentences.english: He sings well, doesn't he?
sentences.hindi: वह अच्छा गाता है, है ना?
sentences.pronunciation: he sings well doesn't he

sentences.english: We will meet, won't we?
sentences.hindi: हम मिलेंगे, ना?
sentences.pronunciation: we will meet won't we

sentences.english: You did this, didn't you?
sentences.hindi: तुमने यह किया, किया ना?
sentences.pronunciation: you did this didn't you

sentences.english: She is a doctor, isn't she?
sentences.hindi: वह डॉक्टर है, है ना?
sentences.pronunciation: she is a doctor isn't she

sentences.english: You can do this, can't you?
sentences.hindi: तुम यह कर सकते हो, कर सकते हो ना?
sentences.pronunciation: you can do this can't you

sentences.english: She likes this, doesn't she?
sentences.hindi: उसे यह पसंद है, है ना?
sentences.pronunciation: she likes this doesn't she

sentences.english: You are not hungry, are you?
sentences.hindi: तुम भूखे नहीं हो, हो ना?
sentences.pronunciation: you are not hungry are you

sentences.english: This is not difficult, is it?
sentences.hindi: यह मुश्किल नहीं है, है ना?
sentences.pronunciation: this is not difficult is it

sentences.english: You have eaten food, haven't you?
sentences.hindi: तुमने खाना खा लिया, लिया ना?
sentences.pronunciation: you have eaten food haven't you

sentences.english: They will come, won't they?
sentences.hindi: वे आएंगे, आएंगे ना?
sentences.pronunciation: they will come won't they

sentences.english: I am right, aren't I?
sentences.pronunciation: i am right aren't i

sentences.english: You didn't do this, did you?
sentences.hindi: यह तुमने नहीं किया, किया ना?
sentences.pronunciation: you didn't do this did you

sentences.english: He was there, wasn't he?
sentences.hindi: वह वहाँ था, था ना?
sentences.pronunciation: he was there wasn't he

sentences.english: You go to school, don't you?
sentences.hindi: तुम स्कूल जाते हो, जाते हो ना?
sentences.pronunciation: you go to school don't you

sentences.english: She wakes up early, doesn't she?
sentences.hindi: वह जल्दी उठती है, उठती है ना?
sentences.pronunciation: she wakes up early doesn't she

sentences.english: We should leave early, shouldn't we?
sentences.hindi: हमें जल्दी जाना चाहिए, चाहिए ना?
